code: import axios from'axios';const BASE_URL='http://localhost:8080/api/notifications';async function requestWithFallback(requests){let lastError;for(const request of requests){try{const response=await request();return response.data;}catch(err){lastError=err;}}throw lastError;}export const notificationService={getByMember:memberId=>axios.get("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(memberId)).then(r=>r.data),create:(memberId,message)=>axios.post("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(memberId),message,{headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}}).then(r=>r.data),markAsRead:id=>requestWithFallback([()=>axios.put("".concat(BASE_URL,"/read/").concat(id),{}),()=>axios.put("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id,"/read"),{}),()=>axios.patch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/read/").concat(id)),()=>axios.patch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id,"/read"))]),delete:id=>requestWithFallback([()=>axios.delete("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id)),()=>axios.delete("".concat(BASE_URL,"/delete/").concat(id))])};
